title.en: The Song of the Sea: When the Jewish People First Sang Together
title.zh: 红海之歌：犹太民族的首次合唱
title.he: שירת הים: כאשר העם היהודי שר ביחד בפעם הראשונה

description: Exploring Shirat HaYam (Exodus 15), the spontaneous song after crossing the Red Sea, and what it teaches about gratitude.
author: Alice (Torah Light Writer)
sources: Chabad.org - Song of the Sea articles
chinese_dynasty_context: Late Shang Dynasty (商朝晚期, ~1300-1260 BCE)
